channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); currently independent (previously Shopify, then Reddit); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Exploration vs Exploitation
item.description: Exploration vs Exploitation The trade-off between showing users what the system currently believes is best (exploitation) and deliberately showing something uncertain to gather signal (exploration).

item.title: Personalizing search results in real-time (MICES 2019)
item.description: Personalizing Search Results in Real-Time (MICES 2019) 📺 Watch: www.youtube.com/watch · 📄 Slides Talk by Roman Grebennikov (Findify) at MICES 2019.

item.title: All about Information Retrieval & Search
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Hello, I am Andrew.

item.title: History
item.description: Awesome Search — Notes History Chronological log of notes added to this knowledge graph. Newest first.

item.title: Index
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Hello, I am Andrew.

item.title: global_toc
item.description: Global Table of Contents A map of every note in the vault organized by category and theme.

item.title: Federated vs Unified Search
item.description: Federated vs Unified Search Two opposing answers to the same problem — one search box over many heterogeneous data sources.

item.title: History-2
item.description: Awesome Search — Note History (Archive) Older entries, 2026-06-18 and earlier. The 10 most recent days live in History. Newest first.

item.title: Query Relaxation
item.description: Query Relaxation Progressively loosening query constraints when a search returns too few (or zero) results, in order to surface something useful rather than failing the user entirely.
